issue.title: Decide WPHX PHP adapter lane vs full Reflaxe target path

artifacts.role: oracle review prompt bundle for any future backend-promotion decision
compiler operations guidance linked to ADR-015
program rollup records strategy clarification without score movement
agent instruction clarification distinguishing Reflaxe substrate from full-target maturity
operations copy of agent instruction clarification

claims: WPHX PHP uses Reflaxe infrastructure in the in-repo compiler.
The current admitted scope remains staged Adapter IR-backed WordPress original-path public adapter emission.
WPHX PHP is not yet a mature arbitrary-Haxe reflaxe.php target.
Full backend promotion requires backend-scale evidence and a later ADR or amendment.
Generated public WordPress PHP quality must be enforced through lint, snapshots, ABI/reflection checks, parity probes, unsupported-empty manifests, and ownership receipts.
non_claims: This receipt does not claim new PHP lowering functionality.
This receipt does not claim installed WordPress functionality or runtime parity.
This receipt does not claim WPHX PHP is already a complete full PHP backend.
This receipt does not move the super-progress score.
